title: Trump’s cryptic Gulf map with red arrows at Iran sparks fresh war fears
summary_full: US President Trump has ignited controversy by tweeting a provocative map aimed at Iran, declaring that 'the clock is ticking' in reference to potential military engagement. This revelation comes on the heels of his discussions with Israeli PM Netanyahu, signaling escalating tensions.
